creator: jcwells@u.washington.edu
text:
checking for jpeglib... configure: error:
You need jpeglib6a. Please install the kdesupport package.
If you have already installed kdesupport, you may have an
old libjpeg somewhere.
In this case copy /lib/libjpeg* to /usr/lib.

The ports page states that kde needs jpeg6b.

Fix: 

You can still build kde without the metaport.
How-To-Repeat: n/a
